title: thuja occidentalis f. lutea
intro: Thuja occidentalis f. lutea, also known as the yellow arborvitae or golden cedar, is a variant of the Eastern White Cedar plant, native to eastern North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and antiseptic qualities, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Thuja occidentalis f. lutea include its ability to support the immune system, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Thuja occidentalis f. lutea can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
